title: Create Invoke-Phase2QuickWins.ps1 remediation script
description: Create scripts/remediation/Invoke-Phase2QuickWins.ps1 orchestrating all 6 Phase 2 quick wins with -WhatIf/-Execute support. QW1: Guest invitation restriction. QW2: Guest role hardening. QW3: Email-verified join. QW4: Teams consumer access. QW5: Teams trial tenant federation. QW6: MFA CA policy report-only. Supports -QuickWins parameter, -TenantKeys filter, pre-change snapshots, ShouldProcess with ConfirmImpact=High.

comments.author: Tyler Granlund
comments.text: Shepherd: APPROVE. Watchdog: APPROVE. Security Auditor: APPROVE for report-only deployment. Notes for Phase 3: (1) Add break-glass exclusion group before enforcement, (2) Add write scopes to CTU.Core Connect-CTUTenant, (3) Add clientAppTypes to CA policy. Merged to main.

title: Run investigation scripts
description: Execute Resolve-UnknownTenants.ps1, Analyze-TLLGuests.ps1, and Invoke-Phase2QuickWins.ps1 -WhatIf. Tyler will auth in browser for scripts that need Graph access.

title: Create Analyze-TLLGuests.ps1 analysis script
description: Create scripts/investigation/Analyze-TLLGuests.ps1 that reads reports/FullAudit_2026-04-10_092748/guests_TLL.csv and produces domain breakdown, creation timeline, pending invitation analysis, cleanup candidates. Outputs reports/tll-guest-analysis.md and reports/tll-guest-cleanup-candidates.csv. Read-only, no Graph auth needed.

comments.author: Tyler Granlund
comments.text: Shepherd: REQUEST_CHANGES — (1) BLOCKING: division-by-zero guard on empty CSV, (2) SHOULD FIX: Write-Verbose for date parse errors, (3) SHOULD FIX: DRY cleanup candidate helper. Watchdog: APPROVE. Code-puppy fixing.

title: Create Resolve-UnknownTenants.ps1 investigation script
description: Create scripts/investigation/Resolve-UnknownTenants.ps1 that resolves 9 unknown tenant IDs from the Phase 1 audit. Uses Graph API findTenantInformationByTenantId, checks GDAP relationships, outputs to reports/unknown-tenant-investigation.json with colored console summary. Uses CTU.Core module for auth.

comments.author: Tyler Granlund
comments.text: Shepherd: APPROVE. Watchdog: APPROVE. Merged to main.

title: Create Validate-Phase2.ps1 validation script
description: Create scripts/validation/Validate-Phase2.ps1 that verifies all 6 Phase 2 quick wins took effect. Queries actual state per tenant, compares to targets, outputs pass/fail checklist with checkmarks. Saves reports/phase-2-validation.json.

title: Update dashboard with investigation results
description: Update dashboard/src/data/audit-data.js with resolved unknown tenant names, TLL guest analysis highlights, and Phase 2 WhatIf results. Restart dev server.
